{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output flagged issues with argument coherence, but did not provide a clear conceptual reconstruction of the related work passage.",
    "R1.4": "The novelty framing is partially supported, as the agent identified one prior work and articulated the delta, but could have done more to map against nearest 3-5 works.",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement was observed in the agent output.",
    "RX.1": "The agent correctly flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stayed within scope, with one minor drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change was not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent output flagged issues with argument coherence, but did not provide a clear conceptual reconstruction of the related work passage.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty framing is partially supported, as the agent identified one prior work and articulated the delta, but could have done more to map against nearest 3-5 works.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement was observed in the agent output.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope, with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was not annotated with source and reason.
